complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Initialize Next.js 14 Project with App Router
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down into: 1) Create Next.js 14 project with TypeScript/Tailwind/ESLint, 2) Install and configure shadcn/ui with WCAG 2.1 AA color palette, 3) Set up folder structure (app/components/lib/hooks/types), 4) Install dependencies (@tanstack/react-query, zod, drizzle-orm, supabase clients) and configure Edge runtime
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Greenfield project setup with well-documented steps. Uses standard npx commands and established tooling. Low complexity as it's mostly configuration. Four logical sub-steps: project creation, UI library setup, folder structure, and dependencies.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Project Blockers — table, raise/resolve, aging indicators
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down into: 1) Create project_blockers schema with RLS + unique partial index, 2) Build 'Raise a flag' modal UI with blocker type selection, 3) Implement Resolve form with required note, 4) Create fuel-poller + Lovable auto-raise hooks integration, 5) Build project-page badge/panel + marketplace/dashboard indicators + NGO Action needed rail
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Medium-high complexity due to multiple UI components, database schema with RLS, and integration with notify() system (#35). Depends on Task 35 (notification system) and Task 75 (design system). The aging detection is handled by #41 so this task focuses on CRUD operations and indicators.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Project Comment Thread (task_comments project-level) + re-homed Actionable-Message Primitive
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down into: 1) Extend task_comments schema with project_id and nullable task_id + indexes, 2) Build project-page comment-stream UI with load-on-open + composer, 3) Implement RLS for implicit membership (NGO admins + assigned volunteer + platform_admin), 4) Implement notify('project_comment') integration + read-only post-handoff mode
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Medium complexity - simpler than originally scoped (decision-15 dropped Realtime/channels/markdown). Schema extension is straightforward. UI is a plain comment list with no real-time requirements. Dependencies on Task 27 (outbox) and Task 75 (design system) are reasonable.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Create Project Schema and Draft/Intake Form
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down into: 1) Create comprehensive projects table with all 30+ columns and indexes, 2) Define status enum with all 10 states per decision-17, 3) Build intake form UI at /ngo/projects/new with required fields, 4) Implement debounced autosave (5-second) via server action, 5) Add cause-tags multi-select component, 6) Write tests for draft creation and autosave
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: High complexity due to large schema (30+ columns, multiple enums, indexes), status state machine (10 states), and autosave functionality. Forms require react-hook-form + zod validation. Depends on Task 5 (NGO profile) and Task 75 (design system).

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Build Project Need Attachments (R2 + Discovery multimodal + Skill download)
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down into: 1) Create project_files table with RLS gated on visibility, 2) Configure Cloudflare R2 bucket with key structure and edge function for signed URLs, 3) Build upload UI with drag-drop + data-responsibility disclosure + Tier-2 hard gate, 4) Implement file type/size validation (25MB/file, 200MB/project), 5) Integrate with Discovery Agent for multimodal ingestion + credit accounting, 6) Build reference-files section on project page with visibility-gated download, 7) Implement Skill /ai4good:files command for .ai4good/reference/ download
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: High complexity with multiple integration points: Cloudflare R2, signed URLs, Discovery Agent multimodal, Skill download. Security considerations (membership checks, Tier-2 gates). Depends on Tasks 9, 10, 75. Multi-system coordination is challenging.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Build Project Page — PM Tree, Activity Feed, Cadence (read-only)
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down into: 1) Build 'Now working on' strip showing in_progress tasks, 2) Create collapsible hierarchical task tree component with status badges, 3) Implement activity feed from audit_events with commit translation, 4) Build cadence-stats panel with commits/week and health badge, 5) Configure Supabase Realtime subscription on project_tasks, 6) Implement RLS visibility (public_mit public / private restricted)
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: High complexity due to multiple interconnected UI components, Supabase Realtime integration, hierarchical data display, and RLS requirements. Pure read-only view but requires real-time updates. Depends on Tasks 19, 21, 75.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down into: 1) Create project_tasks projection schema + RLS policies, 2) Build GitHub push webhook handler at /api/webhooks/github with HMAC verification, 3) Implement ingestPush() core logic for tasks.json diff and upsert, 4) Add commit message parsing for task-N references and Closes semantics, 5) Compute cadence stats (commits/week, sparkline, last-activity), 6) Write audit_events row per ingest with git_commit_sha, 7) Build HEAD-SHA reconciliation cron for missed webhooks, 8) Integrate task_status_changed notifications via #35 notify()
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Very high complexity - this is a core system component. Single writer invariant requires careful design. HMAC verification, webhook handling, commit parsing, cadence computation, cron reconciliation. Critical dependency for multiple downstream tasks (23, 26). Folds in former task #46.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Build Marketplace Listing with Skill/Cause Badges
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down into: 1) Create /marketplace public route with projects query (status='open'), 2) Build project cards with title, summary, complexity, stack, cause tags, NGO badge, 3) Implement skill/cause overlap computation for logged-in volunteers, 4) Build filter UI (skill match, cause, complexity, Lovable, public/private), 5) Implement infinite scroll pagination
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Medium-high complexity. Public-facing page with filtering, badge computation, and infinite scroll. Depends on Tasks 6 (volunteer profile), 12 (triage), and 75 (design system). Straightforward query + UI work but multiple filter states add complexity.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Create NGO Organization Profile and Verification Document Upload
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down into: 1) Build NGO profile form at /ngo/profile with react-hook-form + zod, 2) Create verification_documents table with review fields, 3) Configure Supabase Storage private bucket with signed URL access, 4) Implement file upload with size/type validation (10MB PDF), 5) Build document submission flow that updates verification_state to 'pending'
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Medium-high complexity. Form with validation, file upload to private storage, signed URLs, state machine integration. Depends on Tasks 4 (RLS) and 75 (design system). Supabase Storage integration adds some complexity.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down into: 1) Create status page integration (Upptime or similar), 2) Configure support email with auto-response, 3) Build monitoring readiness dashboard, 4) Document rank-6 reinstatement gate checklist (#40/47/51/52/53/57/58)
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Lower complexity - mostly documentation and configuration. Status page is likely a third-party integration. The rank-6 gate is documentation, not code. Depends on Task 38 (observability) and Task 71 (USER-TEST-11).
